participant_id.Description: The BIDS participant label for the scan.

session_id.Description: The BIDS session label for the scan.

task.Description: The functional task label for the scan.

acq.Description: The BIDS acquisition label used to distinguish scans within the same task.

median_FD.Description: Median framewise displacement across timepoints for the scan.

low_coverage_sum.LongName: Count of retained parcels with less than 50% coverage
low_coverage_sum.Description: Number of parcels below 50% coverage after first removing parcels that were low coverage in more than half of all 691 scans.

qc_determination.Description: Final scan-level QC call for fMRI. A scan fails if median FD is greater than 0.2 mm and/or if more than 2 retained parcels have less than 50% coverage.

Levels.fail: The scan fails QC and should be excluded from fMRI analyses.
Levels.pass: The scan passes QC and can be used in fMRI analyses.
